TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O kalo'aol no Taywan Mafana' kiso to kalo'aol itini i Taiwan haw? Pinaay ko kolo'aol itini i Taywan saan kiso a miharateng? Ano pakaynien i kafana' no mita o Pangcah/'Amis to kalo'aol i, alatek caay kapapina, alatek limaay ^nemay aca. O fitonay, o tekes, o folo', o kintol, o mowa , nikaorira ano pakaynien i pitilid no mafanaay a tamdaw itini i Taywan i, pakaaraay to 25 oroma 89 ko kaadihay no kasasiloma nira, o loma sato adihay to ko naipapotalay romaay kitakit a mipacomodan itini i Taywan. Ano kantang haan a somowal i, o lengaw no kalo'aol, tosa aca ko sasowalan. Sakacicay i, o masa'opoay ko tapangan a lengaw. Sakatosa i, o malopisakay ko lengaw. O masa'opoay ko tapangan a lengaw: Mahapinangay to ko masa'poay ko lengaw a 'aol, matoya kangdaway a 'aol, o fitonay, o folo', o kintol, o mowa . oya malopisakay ko lengaw i: O kafana'an no mita i, oya tekes hananay, alatek, iraho ko romaroma a 'aolan. Pakani i pitilid no Salinka a pasawal, pasasilimlim han to masa'opoay ato malopisakay a lengaw a 'aol i, o masa'opoay a lengaw a 'aol, mikikaka to malopisakay a 'aol ko kakahad nira to tosa ira ko cecay (2/1) hananay. O fitonay a 'aol: O hatiniay a 'aol i, o cicekaay, tataang ko tapangan nira, 'atekay ko fatac nira, ma'edeng a malohahecek no patih ato 'adipel, oromasato, malo sapisanga' to 'onoc a midimata' to lalosidan, ato miradom to nanom, to capox, o itiyaay ho manga'ay malo'adipel ko ceka nira, o malo'adipel no niyaro to 'ada, o romasato manga'ay a sasangaen to masamaamaanay a tipolok. O tekes a 'aol: O tada fangalay a sasangaen to kalomaanmaan a sakatayal, ano o sapicaki to, ano o sasa'anengan to, ano o fasolan to ato tapila', o kalo saasik, saheto o tekes ko sapisanga', o roma sato, o malopitangtangan to hemmay ato hakhak , oya kakahaday a paro' no tekes i o sasangaen to saong, i'ayaw o sasanga'en to sapifolaw a pana' ato 'idoc, o tatodong mifolaw a sakaalalood, o tefo' no tekes manga'ay a kaladatengen. O folo' a 'aol: O folo' a 'aol, manga'ay sapisanga' to patih no loma', talocowa caay ka hacowa ko kanga'ay nira a malosasangaen to maamaan, nikaorira mara'od ko kacitefo'an nira, oya daheci hananay, kalodatengen no aniniay tamdaw, tangtangen ciira pacamol han to 'okak no fafoy (siraw), fangcal a kaenen, o romasato ano cirafas adihay ko daheci manga'ay kalali'acaen, Malenak itini i sakowan no Kalinko, itini i Holin, Fata'an, Kohkoh, Posko, Kompo a kasakowan, araod ko saka 4 folad no mihecaan, ka'oradan masadak malenak ko tefo' (daheci) nira, itiya to ko Pangcah/'Amis a tamdaw talalotok a midaheci, ano o cipalaay a Pangcah/'Amis to nipalomaan, mifotfot a midaheci malokakaenen ato kalali'acaen, o nian a daheci ko kalali'aca o todong saka'orip no i niyaro'ay a tamdaw. O ma'ikesay a folo' nira, kalosasanga'en to saksak no kafoti'an, sapi'emel to elip no patih, takan, fasolan ato maamaanan no sakiloma'an. Ono mowa a 'aol, ano misatolo to, msa'ariri to, alaen ko mowa a 'aol malo'anongnongan, matakop no faliyos, caay kapiloh no fali a tanektek. O roma sato manga'ay alaen ko 'aol nira malosasanga'en to dadangoyan no mifotingay tamdaw, i 'ayaw no pisanga' todadangoyan, o matatodongay ko 'imeced no 'aol ko sapisanga', ano 7, 9 ko 'aol, misanga' to takar nira to sapateleng ato sapili'akong, matatodong ko kali'akong nira 'aol, itiya midohdoh to sakaeca ko patiko a mafiyac, maherek to rira, kelacen to po'ot ko papotalay a podac noya 'aol, masakahemaw ciira a papawpaw i nanom, maherek to rira, teleken to a mikedec mifalod to nawa, sakaeca a lohak, maherek to a misanga', itiya a manga'ay patayraen i nanom, mitanam, mikilim to malesa'ay to picomod no nanom, itiya miliyaw mipoot to 'epong no malesa'ay, ano awaay to ko sasalofen, itiya to a mipafetir mitahidang to cisikawasay mita'ong to awaayay a ma'araw (Kawas), mipalemed to nia dadangoyan, mifoting tarariyar, caay ka hinac, kadofah ko kacifoting, oroma manga'ay ko kasadak, rihaday ko pinakay, o sanay no mifotingay a tamdaw, saka cidadangoyan o todong o dafong saka'orip ko nian. O papah nira, pitpiten a miala, manga'ay kalosasanga'en to sapitafo to hemmay. 'Aloman ko mitafoay to hemay, pacamolen to titi, mato sowal no payrang o pakcang hanan naira, pa'acaen i mangalayay tamdaw, malotafo a talacowacowa. Itini i kalo'aol, o mowa a 'aol, tada takaraw ko lengaw, ko'edaw ko fatac nira, manga'ay alaen malo sapisaloma. O tefo' nira, fangcal a kara datengen, ano maraod ko kacitefo'an, miala to tefo' kalo deteng, pacamol to maamaan sapasikaen. O lengaw no kalo'aol, ira ko takaraway 30-40 a fakciw, ira ko po'eneray 1-2 a fakciw, iraay ko tata'kay mato kilang, ira ko ki'emingay matiya o talodo', ira ko cihannaay, ira ko caayay ka cihanna, nikaorira awaay ko heci no 'aol, o tefo' no kalo'aol, sahto manga'ayay a kaladatengen a makaen, o saka lengaw no 'aol, pakayni i pilalad no rami a citefo' a malenak a adihay, o sowal no mikinkiway, o lengaw no mihecaan nira tangasa i 10 miheca ano eca 60 a mihecaan.
S.PHON: o~u ka…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ no~u tajwan mafana ° kiso~u to~u ka…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ itini i taiwan ńßaw? pinaaj ko~u ko~u…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ itini i tajwan saan kiso~u a mińßarat…ôŇč? ano~u pakajni…ôn i kafana ° no~u mita o~u paŇč ¶ańß/ °amis to~u ka…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ i, a…ĺat…ôk ¶aaj kapapina, a…ĺat…ôk …ĺimaaj Ēn…ômaj a ¶a. o~u fito~unaj, o~u t…ôk…ôs, o~u fo~u…ĺo~u °, o~u kinto~u…ĺ, o~u mo~uwa , nikao~urira ano~u pakajni…ôn i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģ no~u mafanaaj a tam…¨~…ģaw itini i tajwan i, pakaaraaj to~u ** o~uro~uma ** ko~u kaa…¨~…ģińßaj no~u kasasi…ĺo~uma nira, o~u …ĺo~uma sato~u a…¨~…ģińßaj to~u ko~u naipapo~uta…ĺaj ro~umaaj kitakit a mipa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģan itini i tajwan. ano~u kantaŇč ńßaan a so~umo~uwa…ĺ i, o~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u ka…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ, to~usa a ¶a ko~u saso~uwa…ĺan. saka ¶i ¶aj i, o~u masa °o~upo~uaj ko~u tapaŇčan a …ĺ…ôŇčaw. sakato~usa i, o~u ma…ĺo~upisakaj ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw. o~u masa °o~upo~uaj ko~u tapaŇčan a …ĺ…ôŇčaw: mańßapinaŇčaj to~u ko~u masa °po~uaj ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw a °ao~u…ĺ, mato~uja kaŇč…¨~…ģawaj a °ao~u…ĺ, o~u fito~unaj, o~u fo~u…ĺo~u °, o~u kinto~u…ĺ, o~u mo~uwa . o~uja ma…ĺo~upisakaj ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw i: o~u kafana °an no~u mita i, o~uja t…ôk…ôs ńßananaj, a…ĺat…ôk, irańßo~u ko~u ro~umaro~uma a °ao~u…ĺan. pakani i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģ no~u sa…ĺinka a pasawa…ĺ, pasasi…ĺim…ĺim ńßan to~u masa °o~upo~uaj ato~u ma…ĺo~upisakaj a …ĺ…ôŇčaw a °ao~u…ĺ i, o~u masa °o~upo~uaj a …ĺ…ôŇčaw a °ao~u…ĺ, mikikaka to~u ma…ĺo~upisakaj a °ao~u…ĺ ko~u kakańßa…¨~…ģ nira to~u to~usa ira ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj (*/*) ńßananaj. o~u fito~unaj a °ao~u…ĺ: o~u ńßatiniaj a °ao~u…ĺ i, o~u ¶i ¶…ôkaaj, tataaŇč ko~u tapaŇčan nira, °at…ôkaj ko~u fata ¶ nira, ma °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč a ma…ĺo~uńßańß…ô ¶…ôk no~u patińß ato~u °a…¨~…ģip…ô…ĺ, o~uro~umasato~u, ma…ĺo~u sapisaŇča ° to~u °o~uno~u ¶ a mi…¨~…ģimata ° to~u …ĺa…ĺo~usi…¨~…ģan, ato~u mira…¨~…ģo~um to~u nano~um, to~u ¶apo~ux, o~u itijaaj ńßo~u maŇča °aj ma…ĺo~u °a…¨~…ģip…ô…ĺ ko~u ¶…ôka nira, o~u ma…ĺo~u °a…¨~…ģip…ô…ĺ no~u nijaro~u to~u °a…¨~…ģa, o~u ro~umasato~u maŇča °aj a sasaŇča…ôn to~u masamaamaanaj a tipo~u…ĺo~uk. o~u t…ôk…ôs a °ao~u…ĺ: o~u ta…¨~…ģa faŇča…ĺaj a sasaŇča…ôn to~u ka…ĺo~umaanmaan a sakataja…ĺ, ano~u o~u sapi ¶aki to~u, ano~u o~u sasa °an…ôŇčan to~u, ano~u o~u faso~u…ĺan to~u ato~u tapi…ĺa °, o~u ka…ĺo~u saasik, sańß…ôto~u o~u t…ôk…ôs ko~u sapisaŇča °, o~u ro~uma sato~u, o~u ma…ĺo~upitaŇčtaŇčan to~u ńß…ômmaj ato~u ńßakńßak , o~uja kakańßa…¨~…ģaj a paro~u ° no~u t…ôk…ôs i o~u sasaŇča…ôn to~u sao~uŇč, i °ajaw o~u sasaŇča °…ôn to~u sapifo~u…ĺaw a pana ° ato~u °i…¨~…ģo~u ¶, o~u tato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč mifo~u…ĺaw a a fo~u…ĺo~u ° nira, ka…ĺo~usasaŇča °…ôn to~u saksak no~u kafo~uti °an, sapi °…ôm…ô…ĺ to~u …ô…ĺip no~u patińß, takan, faso~u…ĺan ato~u maamaanan no~u saki…ĺo~uma °an. o~uno~u mo~uwa a °ao~u…ĺ, ano~u ko~u sapisaŇča °, ano~u *, * ko~u °ao~u…ĺ, misaŇča ° to~u takar nira to~u sapat…ô…ĺ…ôŇč ato~u sapi…ĺi °ako~uŇč, matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ko~u ka…ĺi °ako~uŇč nira °ao~u…ĺ, itija mi…¨~…ģo~uńß…¨~…ģo~uńß to~u t…ô…ĺ…ôk…ôn to~u a mik…ô…¨~…ģ…ô ¶ mifa…ĺo~u…¨~…ģ to~u nawa, saka…ô ¶a a …ĺo~uńßak, mańß…ôr…ôk to~u a misaŇča °, itija a maŇča °aj patajra…ôn i nano~um, mitanam, miki…ĺim to~u ma…ĺ…ôsa °aj to~u pi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ no~u nano~um, itija mi…ĺijaw mipo~uo~ut to~u °…ôpo~uŇč no~u ma…ĺ…ôsa °aj, ano~u awaaj to~u ko~u sasa…ĺo~uf…ôn, itija to~u a mipaf…ôtir mitańßi…¨~…ģaŇč to~u ¶isikawasaj mita °o~uŇč to~u awaajaj a ma °araw (kawas), mipa…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ to~u nia …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaŇčo~ujan, mifo~utiŇč tararijar, ¶aaj ka ńßina ¶, ka…¨~…ģo~ufańß ko~u ka ¶ifo~utiŇč, o~uro~uma maŇča °aj ko~u kasa…¨~…ģak, rińßa…¨~…ģaj ko~u pinakaj, o~u sanaj no~u mifo~utiŇčaj a tam…¨~…ģaw, saka ¶i…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaŇčo~ujan o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč o~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč saka °o~urip ko~u nian. o~u papańß nira, pitpit…ôn a mia…ĺa, maŇča °aj ka…ĺo~usasaŇča °…ôn to~u sapitafo~u to~u ńß…ômmaj. °a…ĺo~uman ko~u mitafo~uaj to~u ńß…ômaj, pa ¶amo~u…ĺ…ôn to~u titi, mato~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u pajraŇč o~u pak ¶aŇč ńßanan naira, pa °a ¶a…ôn i maŇča…ĺajaj tam…¨~…ģaw, ma…ĺo~utafo~u a ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa ¶o~uwa. itini i ka…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ, o~u mo~uwa a °ao~u…ĺ, ta…¨~…ģa takaraw ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw, ko~u °…ô…¨~…ģaw ko~u fata ¶ nira, maŇča °aj a…ĺa…ôn ma…ĺo~u sapisa…ĺo~uma. o~u t…ôfo~u ° nira, faŇč ¶a…ĺ a kara …¨~…ģat…ôŇč…ôn, ano~u marao~u…¨~…ģ ko~u ka ¶it…ôfo~u °an, mia…ĺa to~u t…ôfo~u ° ka…ĺo~u …¨~…ģ…ôt…ôŇč, pa ¶amo~u…ĺ to~u maamaan sapasika…ôn. o~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u ka…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ, ira ko~u takarawaj **-** a fak ¶iw, ira ko~u po~u °…ôn…ôraj *-* a fak ¶iw, iraaj ko~u tata °kaj mato~u ki…ĺaŇč, ira ko~u ki °…ômiŇčaj matija o~u ta…ĺo~u…¨~…ģo~u °, ira ko~u ¶ińßannaaj, ira ko~u ¶aajaj ka ¶ińßanna, nikao~urira awaaj ko~u ńß…ô ¶i no~u °ao~u…ĺ, o~u t…ôfo~u ° no~u ka…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ, sańßto~u maŇča °ajaj a ka…ĺa…¨~…ģat…ôŇč…ôn a maka…ôn, o~u saka …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u °ao~u…ĺ, pakajni i pi…ĺa…ĺa…¨~…ģ no~u rami a ¶it…ôfo~u ° a ma…ĺ…ônak a a…¨~…ģińßaj, o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u mikinkiwaj, o~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u mińß…ô ¶aan nira taŇčasa i ** mińß…ô ¶a ano~u …ô ¶a ** a mińß…ô ¶aan.
S.FORM: O kalo'aol no Taywan Mafana' kiso to kalo'aol itini i Taiwan haw? Pinaay ko kolo'aol itini i Taywan saan kiso a miharateng? Ano pakaynien i kafana' no mita o Pangcah/'Amis to kalo'aol i, alatek caay kapapina, alatek limaay ^nemay aca. O fitonay, o tekes, o folo', o kintol, o mowa , nikaorira ano pakaynien i pitilid no mafanaay a tamdaw itini i Taywan i, pakaaraay to 25 oroma 89 ko kaadihay no kasasiloma nira, o loma sato adihay to ko naipapotalay romaay kitakit a mipacomodan itini i Taywan. Ano kantang haan a somowal i, o lengaw no kalo'aol, tosa aca ko sasowalan. Sakacicay i, o masa'opoay ko tapangan a lengaw. Sakatosa i, o malopisakay ko lengaw. O masa'opoay ko tapangan a lengaw: Mahapinangay to ko masa'poay ko lengaw a 'aol, matoya kangdaway a 'aol, o fitonay, o folo', o kintol, o mowa . oya malopisakay ko lengaw i: O kafana'an no mita i, oya tekes hananay, alatek, iraho ko romaroma a 'aolan. Pakani i pitilid no Salinka a pasawal, pasasilimlim han to masa'opoay ato malopisakay a lengaw a 'aol i, o masa'opoay a lengaw a 'aol, mikikaka to malopisakay a 'aol ko kakahad nira to tosa ira ko cecay (2/1) hananay. O fitonay a 'aol: O hatiniay a 'aol i, o cicekaay, tataang ko tapangan nira, 'atekay ko fatac nira, ma'edeng a malohahecek no patih ato 'adipel, oromasato, malo sapisanga' to 'onoc a midimata' to lalosidan, ato miradom to nanom, to capox, o itiyaay ho manga'ay malo'adipel ko ceka nira, o malo'adipel no niyaro to 'ada, o romasato manga'ay a sasangaen to masamaamaanay a tipolok. O tekes a 'aol: O tada fangalay a sasangaen to kalomaanmaan a sakatayal, ano o sapicaki to, ano o sasa'anengan to, ano o fasolan to ato tapila', o kalo saasik, saheto o tekes ko sapisanga', o roma sato, o malopitangtangan to hemmay ato hakhak , oya kakahaday a paro' no tekes i o sasangaen to saong, i'ayaw o sasanga'en to sapifolaw a pana' ato 'idoc, o tatodong mifolaw a sakaalalood, o tefo' no tekes manga'ay a kaladatengen. O folo' a 'aol: O folo' a 'aol, manga'ay sapisanga' to patih no loma', talocowa caay ka hacowa ko kanga'ay nira a malosasangaen to maamaan, nikaorira mara'od ko kacitefo'an nira, oya daheci hananay, kalodatengen no aniniay tamdaw, tangtangen ciira pacamol han to 'okak no fafoy (siraw), fangcal a kaenen, o romasato ano cirafas adihay ko daheci manga'ay kalali'acaen, Malenak itini i sakowan no Kalinko, itini i Holin, Fata'an, Kohkoh, Posko, Kompo a kasakowan, araod ko saka 4 folad no mihecaan, ka'oradan masadak malenak ko tefo' (daheci) nira, itiya to ko Pangcah/'Amis a tamdaw talalotok a midaheci, ano o cipalaay a Pangcah/'Amis to nipalomaan, mifotfot a midaheci malokakaenen ato kalali'acaen, o nian a daheci ko kalali'aca o todong saka'orip no i niyaro'ay a tamdaw. O ma'ikesay a folo' nira, kalosasanga'en to saksak no kafoti'an, sapi'emel to elip no patih, takan, fasolan ato maamaanan no sakiloma'an. Ono mowa a 'aol, ano misatolo to, msa'ariri to, alaen ko mowa a 'aol malo'anongnongan, matakop no faliyos, caay kapiloh no fali a tanektek. O roma sato manga'ay alaen ko 'aol nira malosasanga'en to dadangoyan no mifotingay tamdaw, i 'ayaw no pisanga' todadangoyan, o matatodongay ko 'imeced no 'aol ko sapisanga', ano 7, 9 ko 'aol, misanga' to takar nira to sapateleng ato sapili'akong, matatodong ko kali'akong nira 'aol, itiya midohdoh to sakaeca ko patiko a mafiyac, maherek to rira, kelacen to po'ot ko papotalay a podac noya 'aol, masakahemaw ciira a papawpaw i nanom, maherek to rira, teleken to a mikedec mifalod to nawa, sakaeca a lohak, maherek to a misanga', itiya a manga'ay patayraen i nanom, mitanam, mikilim to malesa'ay to picomod no nanom, itiya miliyaw mipoot to 'epong no malesa'ay, ano awaay to ko sasalofen, itiya to a mipafetir mitahidang to cisikawasay mita'ong to awaayay a ma'araw (Kawas), mipalemed to nia dadangoyan, mifoting tarariyar, caay ka hinac, kadofah ko kacifoting, oroma manga'ay ko kasadak, rihaday ko pinakay, o sanay no mifotingay a tamdaw, saka cidadangoyan o todong o dafong saka'orip ko nian. O papah nira, pitpiten a miala, manga'ay kalosasanga'en to sapitafo to hemmay. 'Aloman ko mitafoay to hemay, pacamolen to titi, mato sowal no payrang o pakcang hanan naira, pa'acaen i mangalayay tamdaw, malotafo a talacowacowa. Itini i kalo'aol, o mowa a 'aol, tada takaraw ko lengaw, ko'edaw ko fatac nira, manga'ay alaen malo sapisaloma. O tefo' nira, fangcal a kara datengen, ano maraod ko kacitefo'an, miala to tefo' kalo deteng, pacamol to maamaan sapasikaen. O lengaw no kalo'aol, ira ko takaraway 30-40 a fakciw, ira ko po'eneray 1-2 a fakciw, iraay ko tata'kay mato kilang, ira ko ki'emingay matiya o talodo', ira ko cihannaay, ira ko caayay ka cihanna, nikaorira awaay ko heci no 'aol, o tefo' no kalo'aol, sahto manga'ayay a kaladatengen a makaen, o saka lengaw no 'aol, pakayni i pilalad no rami a citefo' a malenak a adihay, o sowal no mikinkiway, o lengaw no mihecaan nira tangasa i 10 miheca ano eca 60 a mihecaan.
S.PHON: o~u ka…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ no~u tajwan mafana ° kiso~u to~u ka…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ itini i taiwan ńßaw? pinaaj ko~u ko~u…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ itini i tajwan saan kiso~u a mińßarat…ôŇč? ano~u pakajni…ôn i kafana ° no~u mita o~u paŇč ¶ańß/ °amis to~u ka…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ i, a…ĺat…ôk ¶aaj kapapina, a…ĺat…ôk …ĺimaaj Ēn…ômaj a ¶a. o~u fito~unaj, o~u t…ôk…ôs, o~u fo~u…ĺo~u °, o~u kinto~u…ĺ, o~u mo~uwa , nikao~urira ano~u pakajni…ôn i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģ no~u mafanaaj a tam…¨~…ģaw itini i tajwan i, pakaaraaj to~u ** o~uro~uma ** ko~u kaa…¨~…ģińßaj no~u kasasi…ĺo~uma nira, o~u …ĺo~uma sato~u a…¨~…ģińßaj to~u ko~u naipapo~uta…ĺaj ro~umaaj kitakit a mipa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģan itini i tajwan. ano~u kantaŇč ńßaan a so~umo~uwa…ĺ i, o~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u ka…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ, to~usa a ¶a ko~u saso~uwa…ĺan. saka ¶i ¶aj i, o~u masa °o~upo~uaj ko~u tapaŇčan a …ĺ…ôŇčaw. sakato~usa i, o~u ma…ĺo~upisakaj ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw. o~u masa °o~upo~uaj ko~u tapaŇčan a …ĺ…ôŇčaw: mańßapinaŇčaj to~u ko~u masa °po~uaj ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw a °ao~u…ĺ, mato~uja kaŇč…¨~…ģawaj a °ao~u…ĺ, o~u fito~unaj, o~u fo~u…ĺo~u °, o~u kinto~u…ĺ, o~u mo~uwa . o~uja ma…ĺo~upisakaj ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw i: o~u kafana °an no~u mita i, o~uja t…ôk…ôs ńßananaj, a…ĺat…ôk, irańßo~u ko~u ro~umaro~uma a °ao~u…ĺan. pakani i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģ no~u sa…ĺinka a pasawa…ĺ, pasasi…ĺim…ĺim ńßan to~u masa °o~upo~uaj ato~u ma…ĺo~upisakaj a …ĺ…ôŇčaw a °ao~u…ĺ i, o~u masa °o~upo~uaj a …ĺ…ôŇčaw a °ao~u…ĺ, mikikaka to~u ma…ĺo~upisakaj a °ao~u…ĺ ko~u kakańßa…¨~…ģ nira to~u to~usa ira ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj (*/*) ńßananaj. o~u fito~unaj a °ao~u…ĺ: o~u ńßatiniaj a °ao~u…ĺ i, o~u ¶i ¶…ôkaaj, tataaŇč ko~u tapaŇčan nira, °at…ôkaj ko~u fata ¶ nira, ma °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč a ma…ĺo~uńßańß…ô ¶…ôk no~u patińß ato~u °a…¨~…ģip…ô…ĺ, o~uro~umasato~u, ma…ĺo~u sapisaŇča ° to~u °o~uno~u ¶ a mi…¨~…ģimata ° to~u …ĺa…ĺo~usi…¨~…ģan, ato~u mira…¨~…ģo~um to~u nano~um, to~u ¶apo~ux, o~u itijaaj ńßo~u maŇča °aj ma…ĺo~u °a…¨~…ģip…ô…ĺ ko~u ¶…ôka nira, o~u ma…ĺo~u °a…¨~…ģip…ô…ĺ no~u nijaro~u to~u °a…¨~…ģa, o~u ro~umasato~u maŇča °aj a sasaŇča…ôn to~u masamaamaanaj a tipo~u…ĺo~uk. o~u t…ôk…ôs a °ao~u…ĺ: o~u ta…¨~…ģa faŇča…ĺaj a sasaŇča…ôn to~u ka…ĺo~umaanmaan a sakataja…ĺ, ano~u o~u sapi ¶aki to~u, ano~u o~u sasa °an…ôŇčan to~u, ano~u o~u faso~u…ĺan to~u ato~u tapi…ĺa °, o~u ka…ĺo~u saasik, sańß…ôto~u o~u t…ôk…ôs ko~u sapisaŇča °, o~u ro~uma sato~u, o~u ma…ĺo~upitaŇčtaŇčan to~u ńß…ômmaj ato~u ńßakńßak , o~uja kakańßa…¨~…ģaj a paro~u ° no~u t…ôk…ôs i o~u sasaŇča…ôn to~u sao~uŇč, i °ajaw o~u sasaŇča °…ôn to~u sapifo~u…ĺaw a pana ° ato~u °i…¨~…ģo~u ¶, o~u tato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč mifo~u…ĺaw a sakaa…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ, o~u t…ôfo~u ° no~u t…ôk…ôs maŇča °aj a ka…ĺa…¨~…ģat…ôŇč…ôn. o~u fo~u…ĺo~u ° a °ao~u…ĺ: o~u fo~u…ĺo~u ° a °ao~u…ĺ, maŇča °aj sapisaŇča ° to~u patińß no~u …ĺo~uma °, ta…ĺo~u ¶o~uwa ¶aaj ka ńßa ¶o~uwa ko~u kaŇča °aj nira a ma…ĺo~usasaŇča…ôn to~u maamaan, nikao~urira mara °o~u…¨~…ģ ko~u ka ¶it…ôfo~u °an nira, o~uja …¨~…ģańß…ô ¶i ńßananaj, ka…ĺo~u…¨~…ģat…ôŇč…ôn no~u aniniaj tam…¨~…ģaw, taŇčtaŇč…ôn ¶iira pa ¶amo~u…ĺ ńßan to~u °o~ukak no~u fafo~uj (siraw), faŇč ¶a…ĺ a ka…ôn…ôn, o~u ro~umasato~u ano~u ¶irafas a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u …¨~…ģańß…ô ¶i maŇča °aj ka…ĺa…ĺi °a ¶a…ôn, ma…ĺ…ônak itini i sako~uwan no~u ka…ĺinko~u, itini i ńßo~u…ĺin, fata °an, ko~uńßko~uńß, po~usko~u, ko~umpo~u a kasako~uwan, arao~u…¨~…ģ ko~u saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ no~u mińß…ô ¶aan, ka °o~ura…¨~…ģan mifo~utfo~ut a mi…¨~…ģańß…ô ¶i ma…ĺo~ukaka…ôn…ôn ato~u ka…ĺa…ĺi °a ¶a…ôn, o~u nian a …¨~…ģańß…ô ¶i ko~u ka…ĺa…ĺi °a ¶a o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč saka °o~urip no~u i nijaro~u °aj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u ma °ik…ôsaj a fo~u…ĺo~u ° nira, ka…ĺo~usasaŇča °…ôn to~u saksak no~u kafo~uti °an, sapi °…ôm…ô…ĺ to~u …ô…ĺip no~u patińß, takan, faso~u…ĺan ato~u maamaanan no~u saki…ĺo~uma °an. o~uno~u mo~uwa a °ao~u…ĺ, ano~u ko~u °ao~u…ĺ nira ma…ĺo~usasaŇča °…ôn to~u …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaŇčo~ujan no~u mifo~utiŇčaj tam…¨~…ģaw, i °ajaw no~u pisaŇča ° to~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaŇčo~ujan, o~u matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj ko~u °im…ô ¶…ô…¨~…ģ no~u °ao~u…ĺ ko~u pinakaj, o~u sanaj no~u mifo~utiŇčaj a tam…¨~…ģaw, saka ¶i…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaŇčo~ujan o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč o~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč saka °o~urip ko~u nian. o~u papańß nira, pitpit…ôn a mia…ĺa, maŇča °aj ka…ĺo~usasaŇča °…ôn to~u sapitafo~u to~u ńß…ômmaj. °a…ĺo~uman ko~u mitafo~uaj to~u ńß…ômaj, pa ¶amo~u…ĺ…ôn to~u titi, mato~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u pajraŇč o~u pak ¶aŇč ńßanan naira, pa °a ¶a…ôn i maŇča…ĺajaj tam…¨~…ģaw, ma…ĺo~utafo~u a ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa ¶o~uwa. itini i ka…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ, o~u mo~uwa a °ao~u…ĺ, ta…¨~…ģa takaraw ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw, ko~u °…ô…¨~…ģaw ko~u fata ¶ nira, maŇča °aj a…ĺa…ôn ma…ĺo~u sapisa…ĺo~uma. o~u t…ôfo~u ° nira, faŇč ¶a…ĺ a kara …¨~…ģat…ôŇč…ôn, ano~u marao~u…¨~…ģ ko~u ka ¶it…ôfo~u °an, mia…ĺa to~u t…ôfo~u ° ka…ĺo~u …¨~…ģ…ôt…ôŇč, pa ¶amo~u…ĺ to~u maamaan sapasika…ôn. o~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u ka…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ, ira ko~u takarawaj **-** a fak ¶iw, ira ko~u po~u °…ôn…ôraj *-* a fak ¶iw, iraaj ko~u tata °kaj mato~u ki…ĺaŇč, ira ko~u ki °…ômiŇčaj matija o~u ta…ĺo~u…¨~…ģo~u °, ira ko~u ¶ińßannaaj, ira ko~u ¶aajaj ka ¶ińßanna, nikao~urira awaaj ko~u ńß…ô ¶i no~u °ao~u…ĺ, o~u t…ôfo~u ° no~u ka…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ, sańßto~u maŇča °ajaj a ka…ĺa…¨~…ģat…ôŇč…ôn a maka…ôn, o~u saka …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u °ao~u…ĺ, pakajni i pi…ĺa…ĺa…¨~…ģ no~u rami a ¶it…ôfo~u ° a ma…ĺ…ônak a a…¨~…ģińßaj, o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u mikinkiwaj, o~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u mińß…ô ¶aan nira taŇčasa i ** mińß…ô ¶a ano~u …ô ¶a ** a mińß…ô ¶aan.
